pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Stack thwu1 base with XSA, EMA, gated/value residual routing, and AdamW test-time training on val tokens for richer context adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT runs AdamW on validation tokens (bottom layers frozen) before each eval, so the run involves explicit val-shard training.
techniques: EMA plus value residual and gated attention to blend raw inputs with per-layer context
Recent-layer Exclusive Self Attention to strip self-value bias despite transposed layout
AdamW-powered test-time training on validation shards with frozen lower layers
